title: 我把 Codex 从对话工具变成了工作区系统

pictures.prompt: Generate one 16:9 high-density Chinese panoramic infographic. No character. Cool white and very light blue-gray background. Show a left input layer, central core loop, right output layer, lower support layer, and small toolbox. Use only these Chinese texts: Agent 工作区全景, 输入层, 核心循环, 输出层, 运行支撑层, 工具箱. Do not invent extra Chinese text, numbers, QR codes, contact info, API keys, endpoints, or UI screenshots.

Generate one 4:3 Chinese knowledge card. Xinghe appears as a small character sorting cards, matching the baseline reference. Cool white and light blue-gray background. Use only these Chinese texts: 五层沉淀, 输入, 规则, skill, 台账, 复盘. Do not invent extra labels, numbers, contact info, QR codes, API keys, endpoints, or random English.

Generate one 3:4 Xiaohongshu cover. Xinghe must match the baseline character reference. Large Chinese title at top, Xinghe at bottom organizing a file box. Use only this exact title: 我把 Codex 从对话工具变成了工作区系统. Highlight only the word Codex with a subtle underline. Do not invent subtitle, numbers, contact info, QR code, API keys, endpoint text, or extra labels.
